---
title: "Welcome to My Website"
subtitle: "Victoria Lücke | Master Student Statistical Sciences"
output: html_document
toc: false

image: images/IMG_7437 copy-02.JPG
about: 
 template: marquee
 image-shape: rounded
---

## Welcome

Hello and welcome to my portfolio!

I am Victoria Lücke, a Master's student in Statistical Sciences with a background in Economics and a strong interest in data-driven research. I am passionate about using statistical methods and programming to transform data into meaningful insights.

My work focuses on statistical modelling, econometrics, and applied data analysis. Throughout my studies, I have worked on projects involving experimental data, panel data, survey data, and longitudinal data using R, Stata, Python, SPSS, and Tableau.

This website provides an overview of my academic background and technical skills. I hope it gives you an impression of my interests, experience, and approach to quantitative research.
